name: healing-hearts-marketing
description: Dual-track marketing agent team for Healing Hearts. Jeff track targets physician/professional audiences via LinkedIn, podcasts, and medical communities. Trisha track targets natural health/holistic wellness audiences via Instagram, conferences, and wellness communities. Shared foundation (brand voice, frameworks, funnel architecture) keeps both tracks aligned on HH IP and scoring. 9 agents: 3 Jeff, 3 Trisha, 3 shared (Partnership Scout active, Campaign Analyst + Nurture Writer Phase 2).
